-- We observe that the sums m^(k+1) are strictly increasing for m ≥ 2, hence distinct.
  -- Thus the sets B k must be distinct.

  -- Thus m ≤ 2^(#A) - 1.

    rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective]
    · exact Finset.card_univ
    · intros i j h_eq
      dsimp at h_eq
      rw [hB i, hB j] at h_eq
      apply (Nat.pow_right_injective hm).mp
      exact_mod_cast h_eq
  
  have h_distinct_sets : (Finset.univ.image B).card = m := by
    rw [Finset.card_image_of_injective]
    · exact Finset.card_univ
    · intros i j h_eq

      rw [h_eq]
      exact Finset.sum_inj_id

    rw [← this]
    intro h_empty
    rw [h_empty, Finset.sum_empty] at this
    have : m ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) > 0 := pow_pos (by linarith) _
    linarith

      rw [Finset.mem_image] at hs

      · exact h_non_empty k

    have h_card : m ≤ P.card := by

    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (Finset.empty_subset _))] at h_card

    simp only [Fintype.card_fun, Fintype.card_fin, Fintype.card_pi]
    have h_bound : bound + 1 ≤ s * m := by
      rw [bound, mul_tsub, mul_one]
      exact Nat.add_le_of_le_tsub (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right s (by omega)) (by omega)
    calc (bound + 1) ^ n ≤ (s * m) ^ n := Nat.pow_le_pow_left h_bound n
      _ = s ^ n * m ^ n := Nat.mul_pow s m n
      _ ≤ m ^ n * m ^ n := Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.pow_le_pow_left h_ineq n)
      _ = m ^ (2 * n) := by rw [← Nat.pow_add, ← two_mul]
      _ < m ^ s := Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by omega) (by omega)
  obtain ⟨c, d, hne, heq⟩ := Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt F card_lt
  let e (i : Fin s) : ℤ := (c i : ℕ) - (d i : ℕ)
  have he_sum : ∑ i, e i * (m : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ).succ = 0 := by
    simp only [e, sub_mul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    trans ∑ a ∈ A, ((F c a : ℕ) : ℤ) * a - ∑ a ∈ A, ((F d a : ℕ) : ℤ) * a
    · simp only [F, Fin.coe_mk, Nat.cast_sum, Nat.cast_mul, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib,
